summary: All 10 checkable assertions verified against ground truth. Both frontmatter code_refs (LiveKit events.py:107, Pipecat frames.py:962) exact. All inline LiveKit/Cloudflare/Pipecat code citations land on or within a few lines of the cited mechanism. Deepgram quotes are verbatim at cited lines. Only nit: the two Vapi citations use filenames 'vapi-pipeline-2.md'/'vapi-pipeline-1.md' while the on-disk files are 'vapi-pipeline-part-2.md'/'vapi-pipeline-part-1.md' — line numbers and quoted text match exactly, so substance is correct.
